name: Trophy
description: A trophy cup: wide rounded bowl with two curved side handles, tapering into a short stem on a small rectangular base. Thick black outline, flat gold fill, no gradients. Match the art style of the reference image provided. Background is pure white (#FFFFFF).
usedIn: Analytics — achievements tile (badges earned) and Personal Records row icon
WorkoutComplete — 'New Personal Records' header, per-record badge, muscle 'ranked up' badge

name: Crown
description: A simple 3-point royal crown viewed straight-on, with a small round jewel set in the center point. Thick black outline, flat gold fill. Match the art style of the reference image provided. Background is pure white (#FFFFFF).

name: Lock
description: A padlock: rounded rectangular body with a small keyhole cutout, curved shackle looping over the top. Thick black outline, flat fill. Match the art style of the reference image provided. Background is pure white (#FFFFFF).

name: Globe
